allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./js/game-data.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('TOOLS', m.TOOLS_CATALOG.length\); console.log\('helpers', !!m.toolsForStage, !!m.ownedIds, !!m.computeAnticipationBonus, !!m.efficiencyBreakdown\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERR', e.message\)\)")
